mapper.sql: id, title, summary, content, cover, category, tags, view_count, status, author_id, create_time, update_time, publish_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog (title, summary, content, cover, category, tags, view_count, status, author_id, create_time, update_time, publish_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{cover}, #{category}, #{tags}, #{viewCount}, #{status}, #{authorId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{publishTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog SET title=#{title}, summary=#{summary}, content=#{content}, cover=#{cover}, category=#{category}, tags=#{tags}, status=#{status}, update_time=#{updateTime}, publish_time=#{publishTime} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE blog SET view_count = IFNULL(view_count,0) + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
